title: Delay Packets
description: This mod allows you to delay any incoming/outgoing packets. Usefull for debugging plugins on high ping client or with packet loss
body:
# Packet Delay Mod

The **Packet Delay Mod** is a versatile tool that empowers users to introduce delays to incoming and outgoing network packets. This functionality proves invaluable for debugging plugins, particularly in scenarios where clients experience high ping or encounter packet loss.

## Usage

To leverage this mod effectively, consider its utility when debugging on servers with challenging network conditions. Whether you're dealing with a high-ping client or testing plugins in environments with packet loss, the Packet Delay Mod provides a solution to simulate these conditions.

## Legal Disclaimer

It is crucial to be aware of the legal implications and potential challenges associated with using this mod. The Packet Delay Mod can simulate both very high and inconsistent ping, introducing a level of unpredictability to network interactions. As a result, its performance may vary on different servers, and it could exhibit bugs or unexpected behavior.

If you choose to deploy this mod outside the context of debugging on your own server or on servers where you have explicit permission to test, it is important to note that the creator of this mod assumes no responsibility for any resulting bans. This mod is intended strictly for educational purposes.

## Authorship and Modification

The Packet Delay Mod is open for use and modification, provided that the original authorship is acknowledged. Feel free to adapt and enhance the mod according to your needs, but remember to credit the original author in your modifications.

**Author:** Agent Kosticka

---
**Note:** This mod is not intended for malicious use. Please use it responsibly and within the bounds of ethical and legal considerations.
